name: Rick & Morty Randomizer
description: A web app that displays a unique random Rick and Morty character for you every day. Not a fan of your character? You can always choose another!

name: Space Jams
description: Inspired by the stars and space, I built a web app that brings together space related information for users to explore different corners of the universe.

name: Buendia Bytes
description: My personal portfolio showcasing my projects, lessons learned along the way and some of my favorite tools of the trade. This is it! You're in it!

name: Space Jams micro-service
description: A microservice that gathers data from various APIs, cleans, optimizes and serves it to my Space Jams project.

name: Portfolio API
description: A minimal API that stores and delivers data for the projects I'm most proud of throughout my development journey.
